'''Lenthalis''' was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Spirva sector/Legends|Spirva sector]]. Its largest continent was [[Basin]]. The capital [[City/Legends|city]] was [[Hreas Port City]]. It was the headquarters of [[Galladinium Galactic Exports]], one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] largest shipping corporations, founded by [[Unidentified Galladinium president|Galladinium]] around [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]], from which it published annuals of ''[[Galladinium's Galactic Datalog of Fantastic Technology]]''. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] banned the ''Datalog'' since it was being used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to purchase weapons. Hreas contained the [[Commerce Concourse]], where a series of gang-rivalry riots broke out shortly before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].
